user_story: As a System admin, I want to add a new role, so that responsibilities can be assigned to employees consistently
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Role screen; When I click Add new role and provide a role name, description and admin flag; Then the role is saved and listed

user_story: As a System admin, I want to search for roles, so that I can quickly find a specific role
acceptance_criteria: Given roles exist; When I enter a Role name and click Search; Then only matching roles are listed

user_story: As a System admin, I want to reset the role search, so that I can view the full list again
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied a search; When I click Reset; Then the filter clears and all roles are shown

user_story: As a System admin, I want to designate whether a role is an admin role, so that administrative access is granted appropriately
acceptance_criteria: Given I am creating or editing a role; When I set the Is admin flag; Then the role's admin status is saved and shown in the list

user_story: As a System admin, I want to edit an existing role, so that I can update its name or description
acceptance_criteria: Given a role is listed; When I click Edit and change its details; Then the updated role is saved
